zh.Heigham Hall, Gazeley, Suffolk, England,: 英國英格蘭素福爾可加澤利
zh.Wickhambrook, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可維其哈布盧可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jane Heighman於1469年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可加澤利時，她的父親Clement Heigham20歲，母親Joan Cotton30歲。她於1505年與Sir John Bukke在英國英格蘭諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1520年在英國素福爾可維其哈布盧可享年51歲。

zh-hans.Wickhambrook, Suffolk, England: 英国素福爾可維其哈布盧可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jane Heighman于1469年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可加澤利时，她的父亲Clement Heigham20岁，母亲Joan Cotton30岁。她于1505年与Sir John Bukke在英国英格兰諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1520年在英国素福爾可維其哈布盧可享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Heighman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German Heischmann: habitational name for someone from a place called Heisch in Holstein.

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jane Heighman was born in 1469, in Gazeley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Clement Heigham, was 20 and her mother, Joan Cotton, was 30. She married Sir John Bukke in 1505, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1520, in Wickhambrook, Suffolk, England, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jane Heighman est née en 1469, à Gazeley, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Clement Heigham, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Joan Cotton, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Bukke en 1505, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1520, à Wickhambrook, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jane Heighman 1469 in Gazeley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Clement Heigham 20 und ihre Mutter Joan Cotton 30. Sie hat 1505 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Sir John Bukke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1520 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Wickhambrook, Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jane Heighman è nata il nel 1469 nel Gazeley, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Clement Heigham, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Joan Cotton, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Bukke nel 1505, nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1520, nel Wickhambrook, Suffolk, England, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jane Heighmanが1469年にイギリスイギリススフォルクガズエリーで生まれた時，父Clement Heighamは20歳，母Joan Cottonは30歳であった。1505年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクでSir John Bukkeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1520年にイギリススフォルクウィックハンブルークで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jane Heighman(이)가 1469년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 게이즈리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Clement Heigham(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Cotton(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1505년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 Sir John Bukke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1520년 영국 수폴크 윅함브룩에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jane Heighman nasceu em 1469, em Gazeley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Clement Heigham, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Joan Cotton, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Bukke em 1505, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1520, em Wickhambrook, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jane Heighman родилась в 1469 г. в местности газели, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Clement Heigham было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Cotton, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Bukke в 1505 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1520 г. в местности виккхамбрук, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jane Heighman nació en 1469, en Gazeley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Clement Heigham, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Joan Cotton, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Sir John Bukke en 1505, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1520, en Wickhambrook, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años.
